description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a paved driveway leading to a single-car garage, a small front yard with trees, and a covered porch area. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating, a small swimming pool, and landscaped greenery. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The exterior is finished in light neutral tones, with subtle accents and minimal ornamentation. The property is surrounded by a mix of deciduous and evergreen trees, enhancing its suburban appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard deck with a pool. The exterior is light-colored and surrounded by trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard deck and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, outdoor seating, swimming pool, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the backyard, pool, deck, and the side of the house with visible windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, single front door, and paved steps leading from the driveway.
